steps.title: Match the stated goal
steps.content: The question asks for a sentence that presents the study and its findings. A complete answer must identify the researchers' study and include the main finding of 146 springtail species, plus the two genus-level findings.

steps.title: Exclude incomplete choices
steps.content: Choice A gives only genus-level data and omits the study and total count. Choice C names the study goal but not the findings. Choice D gives some data but drops the study context and frames the genus comparison as the main point. The answer is B.
